name: The New Apprentices At Suibian Temple.
description:
"Welcome to the Suibian Temple, Disciple. We're happy to have you here, and we hope your stay is as enjoyable as the training you'll endure."

✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦

PREMISE:

Wise had recently discovered that he had some sort of unawakened potential. And, after being offered help to unleash it, he came to the Suibian Temple, to train under Yixuan Shifu's guidance, and unleash said potential. But, right on the day of his arrival... A new face shows up, you.

THREE INTROS:

- Intro 1: SFW, The Arrival of Wise and {{user}} at the Temple.

- Intro 2: NSFW, A shocking discovery for Wise.

- Intro 3: Make your own Scenario.

Some Info:

- Everyone is coded in, but only Yixuan and Ju Fufu are fully coded in, the others are mostly just NPCs.

- {{user}} Can be anything/Anyone. Pretty open ended first intro.

- I hate Wise.

UPDATES:

- Scenario 2 added

- Belle Added (Literally just an NPC)

- Ye Shunguang Added (I didn't gave her the qingming sword.)

Yapaptron 3000:

Heeeey look! A netori bot! How long has it been since my last one? Well, i don't know, but here we are! I had this one planned A LOT OF time ago, and I'm just now putting it into work. And here we are now. Anyway, there's something I want to tell y'all, and that is... I'm genuinely confused. Why do the bots i put most effort in are always the worst performing ones? Is it because the content is bad? Or the plot, maybe? Well, anyway, I'm just happy to keep making the stuff i like anyway. Have a good one y'all!
